Uses of Interface
recoder.abstraction.ClassType

Packages that use ClassType
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
recoder.abstraction
This package contains the meta model abstractions as used by the semantical services.
recoder.bytecode
This package contains classes that cover information derived from Java byte code.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    Classes in recoder.abstraction that implement ClassType
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    IntersectionType
    Represents an intersection type, which was introduced in java 5.
    class 
    NullType
    A program model element representing the null type.
    class 
    ParameterizedType
    A parameterized type, meaning a generic type plus actual type arguments.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ClassType>
    ClassType.getAllSupertypes()
    Returns the list of all supertypes of this class type, in topological order, including the class type itself as first element.
    List<ClassType>
    IntersectionType.getAllSupertypes()
     
    List<ClassType>
    NullType.getAllSupertypes()
    Returns the list of all supertypes of this class type, including this type.
    List<ClassType>
    ParameterizedType.getAllSupertypes()
     
    List<ClassType>
    ClassType.getAllTypes()
    Returns all class types that are inner types of this class type, including visible inherited types.
    List<ClassType>
    IntersectionType.getAllTypes()
     
    List<ClassType>
    NullType.getAllTypes()
    Returns all class types that are inner types of this class type.
    List<ClassType>
    ParameterizedType.getAllTypes()
     
    List<ClassType>
    DefaultConstructor.getExceptions()
    Returns the (empty) exception list of this constructor.

    Returns the exceptions of this method or constructor.

    ClassType.getSupertypes()
    Returns the list of locally declared supertypes of this class type.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<? extends ClassType>
    TypeKit.getCoveredSubtypes(ProgramModelInfo pmi, List<? extends ClassType> list)
    Gets all types in the given list that are subtypes of other types in the list.

    Query that collects all types in a package that are not available as sources.
    List<ClassType>
    MissingTypeDeclarations.getNonTypeDeclarations()
     
    static List<ClassType>
    TypeKit.removeCoveredSubtypes(ProgramModelInfo pmi, List<ClassType> list)
    Removes types in the given list that are subtypes of other types in the list and returns the removed types in a new list.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Import
    UnitKit.appendImport(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit cu, ClassType ct)
    Deprecated.
    should become a fully grown transformation
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
    Query that returns a list of methods would redefine, implement or are overriden or implemented each other starting from method methodName in type with specified signature .
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(NameInfo ni, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
     
    static Method
    MethodKit.getDefinedMethod(ClassType type, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Query returning a method locally defined in the given type with the given name and signature.
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefinedMethods(NameInfo ni, ClassType base, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Query returning the methods which a method in the given class with the given name and signature would redefine.
    static ClassType
    TypeKit.getSuperClass(NameInfo ni, ClassType ct)
    Query returing the super class of the given class type.
    static boolean
    ModifierKit.makeVisible(ChangeHistory ch, SourceInfo si, MemberDeclaration mdecl, ClassType ct)
    Deprecated.
    will be replaced; does not make visible redefined members
    Method parameters in recoder.kit with type arguments of type ClassType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<? extends ClassType>
    TypeKit.getCoveredSubtypes(ProgramModelInfo pmi, List<? extends ClassType> list)
    Gets all types in the given list that are subtypes of other types in the list.
    static boolean
    TypeKit.isCovered(ProgramModelInfo pmi, List<? extends ClassType> x, List<? extends ClassType> y)
    Checks if for each class type in the first type list there is a super type in the second.
    static List<ClassType>
    TypeKit.removeCoveredSubtypes(ProgramModelInfo pmi, List<ClassType> list)
    Removes types in the given list that are subtypes of other types in the list and returns the removed types in a new list.

    DefaultByteCodeInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct)
     
    List<Method>
    DefaultImplicitElementInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct)
     
    List<Method>
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature)
     
    List<Method>
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs)
    calls getMethods with context = ct
    List<Method>
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs, ClassType context)
     
    List<Method>
    DefaultSourceInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct)
     
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct)
    Returns the methods locally defined within the given class type.
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Returns the list of most specific methods with the given name that are defined in the given type or in a supertype where they are visible for the given type, and have a signature that is compatible to the given one.
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs)
     
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs, ClassType context)
    Returns the list of most specific methods with the given name that are defined in the given type or in a supertype where they are visible for a second given type, and have a signature that is compatible to the given one.
    protected ClassType
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getOutermostType(ClassType t)
     
    List<ClassType>
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getSubtypes(ClassType ct)
     
    List<ClassType>
    ProgramModelInfo.getSubtypes(ClassType ct)
    Returns all known subtypes of the given class type.
    List<ClassType>
    DefaultByteCodeInfo.getSupertypes(ClassType ct)

    List<ClassType>
    DefaultSourceInfo.getSupertypes(ClassType ct)
     
    List<ClassType>
    ProgramModelInfo.getSupertypes(ClassType ct)
    Returns the list of locally declared supertypes of the given class type.
    final TypeDeclaration
    DefaultSourceInfo.getTypeDeclaration(ClassType ct)
     
    TypeDeclaration
    SourceInfo.getTypeDeclaration(ClassType ct)
    Returns the syntactical counterpart of the given classtype.
    PrimitiveType
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.getUnboxedType(ClassType boxedType)
    return the PrimitiveType this ClassType can be unboxed to, or null if this ClassType cannot be unboxed.
    PrimitiveType
    ProgramModelInfo.getUnboxedType(ClassType boxedType)
    return the PrimitiveType this ClassType can be unboxed to, or null if this ClassType cannot be unboxed.
    boolean
    DefaultImplicitElementInfo.isInterface(ClassType ct)
     
    boolean
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.isSubtype(ClassType a, ClassType b)
     
    boolean
    ProgramModelInfo.isSubtype(ClassType a, ClassType b)
    Checks if the first given class type is a subtype of the second.
    boolean
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.isSupertype(ClassType a, ClassType b)
     
    boolean
    ProgramModelInfo.isSupertype(ClassType a, ClassType b)
    Checks if the first given class type is a supertype of the second.
    boolean
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.isVisibleFor(Member m, ClassType t)
     
    boolean
    ProgramModelInfo.isVisibleFor(Member m, ClassType t)
    Checks visibility of the given member from the point of view of the given class type.
    boolean
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.isWidening(ClassType from, ClassType to)
     
    boolean
    ProgramModelInfo.isWidening(ClassType from, ClassType to)
    Checks if the first given class type is widening to the second one.
    void
    DefaultNameInfo.register(ClassType ct)
     
    void
    NameInfo.register(ClassType ct)
    Registers a class type.
    Constructors in recoder.service with parameters of type ClassType

    Constructor
    Description
     
    AmbiguousImportException(String s, Import importStatement, ClassType version1, ClassType version2)
    Constructor with an explanation text.
     
    AmbiguousImportException(Import importStatement, ClassType version1, ClassType version2)
    Constructor without explanation text.
     
    CyclicInheritanceException(String s, ClassType ct)
    Constructor with an explanation text.
     
    CyclicInheritanceException(ClassType ct)
